reference: Hi, may I answer your health queries right now? Please type your response. My name is Glenda. My question is that I am twenty-three weeks pregnant and I have four more children. They were all born at thirty-five weeks or less, and I want to know what are the risks of me going into early labor again.
text: Hi, may I answer your health queries right now? My name is Glenda. My question is that I am 23 weeks pregnant and I have four more children. They were all born at 35 weeks or less. And I want to know what are the risks of me going into early labor again?
